evidence_type: offline executable runtime validation with stubbed external GitCode HTTP provider
freshness: current repository checkout; validation script generates and runs a Go runtime test against the production adapter and HTTP client packages

mocks_used.name: httptest GitCode API server
mocks_used.purpose: simulate GitCode REST API responses for issue, wiki, comment, create issue, 429, 401, and 403 without live network access

notes: Live network validation is intentionally disabled for this materialized scenario set.
The runtime test exercises production package behavior through local commands and a stubbed external provider, not source grep or documentation checks.
The scenario asserts that explicit live read/write paths use remote-shaped responses and do not fall back to fixture-only identifiers or read-only fixture write errors.
